args.sql:
SELECT objid, teigid, lagretberegnetareal, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%'
  AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000;

1.sql:
SELECT objid, teigid, lagretberegnetareal, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%'
  AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000;

1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Drammen municipality

2.description: select parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m2

3.description: get 200-year flood zones (gjentaksintervall = 200) reduced by attribute

4.description: find parcels that intersect 200-year flood zones

5.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons (kartleggingsomrade) for municipality reduction

6.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to Drammen municipality extent

7.description: compute distances from flooded parcels to quick-clay polygons

8.description: collapse to one row per parcel with min distance

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT objid, teigid, lagretberegnetareal, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'
  AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000;

2.sql:
SELECT objid, teigid, lagretberegnetareal, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'
  AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000;

1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year flood zones (gjentaksintervall=200) national layer filtered by attribute

3.description: reduce 200-year flood zones to Drammen extent by intersecting with municipality geometry

4.description: get parcels (teig) larger than 5000 m2 with geometry

5.description: find parcels in Drammen that intersect 200-year flood zones

7.description: compute nearest quick-clay distance to each affected parcel

8.description: sort parcels by nearest quick-clay distance ascending

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, omrade
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT objid, teigid, lagretberegnetareal, kommunenummer, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE lagretberegnetareal > 5000;
